steps.title: Support breadth of disciplines
steps.content: The underlined claim says Reckoning and Resilience is set apart by its breadth of disciplines. Evidence that named artists work in different media would directly support that claim.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant findings
steps.content: Choice A concerns ownership, not artistic disciplines. Choice C describes the museum's general collection. Choice D describes the earlier photography exhibition but does not show breadth in Reckoning and Resilience. The answer is B.
